mapper.insert: insert into wf_surrogate (id, process_Name, operator, surrogate, odate, sdate, edate, state) values (#{id}, #{processName}, #{operator}, #{surrogate}, #{odate}, #{sdate}, #{edate}, #{state})
mapper.update: update wf_surrogate set process_Name = #{processName}, surrogate = #{operator}, odate = #{odate}, sdate = #{sdate}, edate = #{edate}, state = #{state} where id = #{id}
